name: Ahmed Hüsrev Altınbaşak hattı referans standardı
reference_policy: Use this direct reference source for Ottoman Turkish and Arabic calligraphic styling. Do not use alternative style references unless explicitly approved.

style_contract.visual_target: Ahmed Hüsrev Altınbaşak calligraphic manuscript style
style_contract.green_highlight_policy: Highlighted Ottoman/Arabic words must preserve the same hand, angle, weight, and spacing as surrounding script.
style_contract.font_fallback_note: Runtime CSS can only approximate typography with installed fonts; final visual accuracy requires user-provided samples or licensed font assets, which are not embedded here.

fa.style_reference: Ahmed Hüsrev Altınbaşak hattı uyumlu RTL fallback
